name: Solutiance AG
summary: Solutiance AG provides software-based solutions for real estate management business. It offers Facility scanner, a platform for auditing and monitoring real estate documents; and Roof management 4.0, a solution that provides maintenance, testing, and repairing services to the roofers. The company was formerly known as PROGEO Holding AG. Solutiance AG was founded in 1992 and is based in Potsdam, Germany.
